models.name: jina-clip-v1

models.name: InternLM3-8B-Instruct

models.name: jina-reranker-m0
models.description: jina-reranker-m0 是一种突破性的多模态多语言重排器，旨在对多种语言的视觉文档进行排序。该模型的卓越之处在于它能够处理 29 种语言的查询以及视觉丰富的文档图像（包括带有文本、图形、表格和各种布局的页面）。该模型输出按与输入查询的相关性排序的文档列表。

metadata.tags: 多语言, 向量化和重排, 10K

models.name: Spark-TTS-0.5B
models.description: Spark-TTS 是一款先进的文本转语音系统，它利用大型语言模型 (LLM) 的强大功能，实现高精度、自然的语音合成。它高效、灵活、功能强大，适用于研究和生产环境。

metadata.tags: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, 语音和音频合成, 多语言, MindSpore

models.name: nomic-embed-code
models.description: nomic-embed-code 是由 Nomic AI 发布的先进开源代码嵌入模型，拥有 70 亿参数，支持多种编程语言，并在 CodeSearchNet 等基准测试中表现优异，适用于代码检索等任务。​

metadata.tags: 32K, 多语言, 768 维, 向量化和重排

models.name: all-mpnet-base-v2
models.description: all-mpnet-base-v2 是一个高性能句子嵌入模型，基于微软的 MPNet 架构，经过在超过 10 亿对句子数据上的对比学习微调，能够将句子或段落映射为 768 维的密集向量，广泛应用于语义搜索、文本聚类、相似度计算等自然语言处理任务。

metadata.tags: Apache license 2.0, 768 维, 向量化和重排

models.name: HealthGPT 医疗大模型
models.description:
HealthGPT 是一个通过微调大语言模型（LLM）来专注于医疗健康领域的智能系统，旨在提供精确的临床症状分析、疾病诊断辅助、治疗建议以及个性化健康咨询，结合医学文献和临床数据进行专业化的知识推理与分析。​该项目由浙江大学、南京大学、浙江大学医学院附属第二医院和新加坡国立大学的研究人员联合开发。

HealthGPT 给出的答案仅供参考，不能替代专业医生的诊断治疗！！！

metadata.tags: 32K, 多模态, 行业大模型, 医疗, AI for Science

models.name: DeepSeek-Prover 数学定理证明
models.description: DeepSeek-Prover-V2 是一款专为 Lean 4 形式化定理证明打造的开源大语言模型，具备将复杂问题拆解为子目标、合成链式推理过程的能力。模型通过 DeepSeek-V3 驱动的递归证明管线进行冷启动训练，融合非形式与形式数学推理，显著提升了定理证明效率与泛化能力。

metadata.tags: 行业大模型, 数学, AI for Science

models.name: MedGemma 医疗大模型

models.name: GLM-ASR

models.name: AutoGLM-Phone-9B-Multilingual
models.description: AutoGLM-Phone-9B-Multilingual 是一个基于 AutoGLM 的多语言手机智能助手大模型，能够通过视觉-语言理解手机屏幕内容并根据自然语言指令自动执行操作任务（如打开应用、浏览界面、点击等）。

models.name: HY-MT1.5-7B 翻译大模型
models.description: HY-MT1.5-7B 是腾讯混元开源的高性能多语言机器翻译模型（7B 参数级别），基于获得 WMT25 翻译冠军的架构优化而来，支持 33 种语言互译、术语干预、上下文理解与格式保留等高级翻译功能，在标准翻译任务上实现高质量与高实用性输出。

metadata.tags: 32K, 行业大模型

models.name: GLM-4.7-Flash
models.description: GLM-4.7-Flash 作为 30B 级 SOTA 模型，提供了一个兼顾性能与效率的新选择。面向 Agentic Coding 场景强化了编码能力、长程任务规划与工具协同，并在多个公开基准的当期榜单中取得同尺寸开源模型中的领先表现。在执行复杂智能体任务，在工具调用时指令遵循更强，Artifacts 与 Agentic Coding 的前端美感和长程任务完成效率进一步提升。

metadata.tags: 文本生成, Function Calling, 200K, 128K, OpenClaw 模型

models.name: NVIDIA: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni (free)
models.description:
NVIDIA Nemotron™ 3 Nano Omni is a 30B-A3B open multimodal model designed to function as a perception and context sub-agent in enterprise agent systems. It accepts text, image, video, and audio inputs and produces text output, enabling agents to perceive and reason across modalities in a single inference loop.

Built on a hybrid MoE Transformer-Mamba architecture with Conv3D video layers and Efficient Video Sampling (EVS), it delivers approximately 2× higher throughput and 2.5× lower compute for

models.name: Poolside: Laguna XS.2 (free)
models.description: Laguna XS.2 is the second-generation model in the XS size class from [Poolside](https://poolside.ai), their efficient coding agent series. It combines tool calling and reasoning capabilities with a compact footprint, offering a 128K context window and up to 8K output tokens. Quantized to fp8 for fast, cost-efficient agentic coding workflows. By using this model, you agree to Poolside’s [End User License Agreement](https://poolside.ai/legal/eula)

models.name: Google: Gemma 4 26B A4B  (free)
models.description: Gemma 4 26B A4B IT is an instruction-tuned Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model from Google DeepMind. Despite 25.2B total parameters, only 3.8B activate per token during inference — delivering near-31B quality at a fraction of the compute cost. Supports multimodal input including text, images, and video (up to 60s at 1fps). Features a 256K token context window, native function calling, configurable thinking/reasoning mode, and structured output support. Released under Apache 2.0.

models.name: Qwen: Qwen3 Next 80B A3B Instruct (free)
models.description: Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct is an instruction-tuned chat model in the Qwen3-Next series optimized for fast, stable responses without “thinking” traces. It targets complex tasks across reasoning, code generation, knowledge QA, and multilingual use, while remaining robust on alignment and formatting. Compared with prior Qwen3 instruct variants, it focuses on higher throughput and stability on ultra-long inputs and multi-turn dialogues, making it well-suited for RAG, tool use, and agentic workflows

rateLimits.notes: Free models limited to 20 req/min, 50/day on basic accounts

models.name: NVIDIA: Nemotron Nano 9B V2 (free)
models.description:
NVIDIA-Nemotron-Nano-9B-v2 is a large language model (LLM) trained from scratch by NVIDIA, and designed as a unified model for both reasoning and non-reasoning tasks. It responds to user queries and tasks by first generating a reasoning trace and then concluding with a final response. 

The model's reasoning capabilities can be controlled via a system prompt. If the user prefers the model to provide its final answer without intermediate reasoning traces, it can be configured to do so.

rateLimits.notes: Free models limited to 20 req/min, 50/day on basic accounts

models.name: OpenAI: gpt-oss-120b (free)
models.description: gpt-oss-120b is an open-weight, 117B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model from OpenAI designed for high-reasoning, agentic, and general-purpose production use cases. It activates 5.1B parameters per forward pass and is optimized to run on a single H100 GPU with native MXFP4 quantization. The model supports configurable reasoning depth, full chain-of-thought access, and native tool use, including function calling, browsing, and structured output generation.

rateLimits.notes: Free models limited to 20 req/min, 50/day on basic accounts

models.name: OpenAI: gpt-oss-20b (free)
models.description: gpt-oss-20b is an open-weight 21B parameter model released by OpenAI under the Apache 2.0 license. It uses a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture with 3.6B active parameters per forward pass, optimized for lower-latency inference and deployability on consumer or single-GPU hardware. The model is trained in OpenAI’s Harmony response format and supports reasoning level configuration, fine-tuning, and agentic capabilities including function calling, tool use, and structured outputs.

rateLimits.notes: Free models limited to 20 req/min, 50/day on basic accounts

models.name: Z.ai: GLM 4.5 Air (free)
models.description: GLM-4.5-Air is the lightweight variant of our latest flagship model family, also purpose-built for agent-centric applications. Like GLM-4.5, it adopts the Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture but with a more compact parameter size. GLM-4.5-Air also supports hybrid inference modes, offering a "thinking mode" for advanced reasoning and tool use, and a "non-thinking mode" for real-time interaction. Users can control the reasoning behaviour with the `reasoning` `enabled` boolean. [Learn more in our

models.name: Qwen: Qwen3 Coder 480B A35B (free)
models.description:
Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct is a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) code generation model developed by the Qwen team. It is optimized for agentic coding tasks such as function calling, tool use, and long-context reasoning over repositories. The model features 480 billion total parameters, with 35 billion active per forward pass (8 out of 160 experts).

Pricing for the Alibaba endpoints varies by context length. Once a request is greater than 128k input tokens, the higher pricing is used.

rateLimits.notes: Free models limited to 20 req/min, 50/day on basic accounts

models.name: Venice: Uncensored (free)
models.description: Venice Uncensored Dolphin Mistral 24B Venice Edition is a fine-tuned variant of Mistral-Small-24B-Instruct-2501, developed by dphn.ai in collaboration with Venice.ai. This model is designed as an “uncensored” instruct-tuned LLM, preserving user control over alignment, system prompts, and behavior. Intended for advanced and unrestricted use cases, Venice Uncensored emphasizes steerability and transparent behavior, removing default safety and alignment layers typically found in mainstream assistan

models.description: Gemma 3n E2B IT is a multimodal, instruction-tuned model developed by Google DeepMind, designed to operate efficiently at an effective parameter size of 2B while leveraging a 6B architecture. Based on the MatFormer architecture, it supports nested submodels and modular composition via the Mix-and-Match framework. models.name: Meta: Llama 3.3 70B Instruct (free)
models.description:
The Meta Llama 3.3 multilingual large language model (LLM) is a pretrained and instruction tuned generative model in 70B (text in/text out). The Llama 3.3 instruction tuned text only model is optimized for multilingual dialogue use cases and outperforms many of the available open source and closed chat models on common industry benchmarks.

Supported languages: English, German, French, Italian, Portuguese, Hindi, Spanish, and Thai.

Designed with the latest transformer architecture, it supports eight languages, including English, Spanish, and Hindi, and is adaptable for additional languages.

Trained on 9 trillion tokens, the Llama 3.2 3B model excels in instruction-following, complex reasoning, and tool use. Its balanced performance makes i

models.name: Nous: Hermes 3 405B Instruct (free)
models.description:
Hermes 3 is a generalist language model with many improvements over Hermes 2, including advanced agentic capabilities, much better roleplaying, reasoning, multi-turn conversation, long context coherence, and improvements across the board.

Hermes 3 405B is a frontier-level, full-parameter finetune of the Llama-3.1 405B foundation model, focused on aligning LLMs to the user, with powerful steering capabilities and control given to the end user.

The Hermes 3 series builds and expands on the Herme

rateLimits.notes: Free models limited to 20 req/min, 50/day on basic accounts

models.name: Qwen3.5-2B
models.description: Qwen3.5-2B是阿里云开源的20亿参数轻量大模型，兼顾小体积与强性能，可在手机、笔记本等端侧设备本地运行，在对话、轻量代码等场景表现均衡。

models.name: Qwen-Image-2512
models.description: Qwen-Image-2512 是阿里云通义千问推出的 12 月更新版文本到图像基础模型，相较 8 月版本大幅提升了人物真实感、自然细节精细度与文字渲染质量，在 AI Arena 超 1 万轮盲评中成为当前最强的开源文本生成图像模型，且在闭源模型阵营中也具备较强竞争力。

models.name: DeepSeek-OCR
models.description: DeepSeek-OCR 是深度求索（DeepSeek）推出的高性能光学字符识别（OCR）模型，作为面向通用与垂直场景的 OCR 解决方案，DeepSeek-OCR 具备 “全模态识别 + 结构化输出” 的核心能力，覆盖从文本提取到信息解析的全流程。

models.name: HunyuanOCR
models.description: HunyuanOCR 是腾讯混元于 2025 年 11 月 25 日开源的一款商业级轻量 OCR 专用视觉语言模型，凭借端到端架构设计，兼顾了识别性能与部署便捷性，适配多场景多语种 OCR 相关需求。

models.name: Hunyuan-MT-7B
models.description: 文档翻译、跨语言内容生成、多语言客服对话等，支持 “中文与其他语言互译”“非中文语言间互译” 两类模式。7B 参数规模的核心翻译模型，负责将源语言文本精准转换为目标语言，支持 33 种语言互译（含中文、英语、法语等主流语言，以及藏语、哈萨克语等 5 种中国少数民族语言），在同规模模型中性能达行业领先水平。

models.name: Qwen3-1.7B
models.description: Qwen3-1.7B 是 Qwen 系列轻量级因果语言模型，经预训练与后期优化，具备 17 亿参数规模，采用 28 层 Transformer 架构，原生支持 32,768 tokens 长上下文，兼顾高效推理与长文本处理能力，适合中小算力场景快速部署及多轮对话、短文本生成等任务。

models.name: Z-Image-Turbo
models.description: Z-Image 是一款开源、免费的高效图像生成基础模型，参数量为 6B，1秒出图。无需依赖顶级算力和参数堆砌，即可在 16GB 显存的消费级显卡上，生成品质可与顶级商业模型相媲美的超真实图像，尤其在中英双语文本渲染方面效果突出。

models.name: Qwen3-Reranker-8B
models.description: Qwen3-Reranker-8B 是 Qwen3 系列专为文本嵌入与重排序设计的 80 亿参数模型，支持 100 + 语言及长上下文，继承 Qwen3 基础模型的多语言理解与推理能力，在 MTEB-R、CMTEB-R 等多语言检索评测中表现突出（如 MTEB-R 得分 69.76），具备指令感知特性（自定义指令可提升 1%-5% 性能），适用于文本检索、代码检索、文本分类等场景。

models.name: Qwen3-Embedding-8B
models.description: Qwen3-Embedding-8B 是阿里巴巴 2025 年 6 月开源的轻量级文本嵌入模型，专为文本嵌入和排序任务设计，继承基础模型多语言、长文本理解与推理能力，在文本检索、代码检索等任务中进步显著，8B 模型居 MTEB 多语言排行榜首位，支持超 100 种语言及用户自定义指令，兼具多功能性与灵活性。

models.name: Qwen3-0.6B
models.description: Qwen3-0.6B 是 Qwen 系列轻量级因果语言模型，经预训练与后期优化，具备 60 亿参数规模，采用 28 层 Transformer 架构，原生支持 32,768 tokens 长上下文，适合中小算力场景快速部署及轻量级对话、短文本生成等任务。

models.name: Qwen3-4B
models.description: Qwen3-4B 是 Qwen 系列的轻量级因果语言模型，经预训练与后期优化，具备 40 亿参数规模，采用 36 层 Transformer 架构，原生支持 32K tokens 长上下文（通过 YaRN 技术可扩展至 131K tokens），兼顾高效推理与长文本处理能力，适用于中小规模场景的快速部署与多轮对话、文档分析等任务。

models.name: 星火医疗大模型-Lite
models.description: 讯飞医疗自研的医疗垂类大模型，是针对医疗领域需求开发的 AI 模型。它经海量医疗数据预训练，可辅助医疗知识问答、药物查询、提供健康管理建议等。相比通用模型，其对医疗知识挖掘更深，应用更贴合场景。

models.name: Spark Lite
models.description: 讯飞自研的轻量级大语言模型，具有更高的推理性能并兼顾优异的模型效果。在实际场景中，适用于对时延要求极高的移动设备端快速响应场景，精调后在处理简单交互任务时能展现出更优质的效果，例如移动APP中的快速问答、智能语音助手的基础交互等场景。

models.name: Spark Mini
models.description: 讯飞自研的高性能大语言模型，适合作为基座模型进行精调，能出色地处理较为复杂的特定场景问题。例如在企业内部知识问答系统中，可有效处理员工提出的与业务相关的问题，因其具备极佳的推理性能，能够快速准确地给出答案，适用于企业智能客服、专业知识咨询等场景。

models.name: Spark Mini Instruct
models.description: 讯飞自研的高性能大语言模型，在指令解析等场景上有明显优势。在工业自动化控制系统等处理复杂指令场景时，能够快速准确地理解并执行指令，适用于工业控制、复杂设备交互等场景。

models.name: Spark Tiny
models.description: 讯飞自研的超高性能大语言模型，其部署和精调成本在星火系列模型中最具性价比。在对成本较为敏感但又需要一定性能支持的场景表现良好，比如小型创业公司的在线客服系统，能在满足性能需求的同时节省成本，适用于小型企业客服、低成本智能交互应用等场景。

models.name: StableDiffusion_XL_Base_1
models.description: 【可商用】SD XL 1.0由Stability AI研发并开源的文生图模型。
